artist_id.description: Optional FK to artists. Null means this is an appointment-level default rule.

appointment_type_id.description: Optional FK to appointment types. Null means this is an artist-level default rule.

split_percent.description: Legacy artist percentage of eligible revenue (kept for backward compatibility)

split_mode.description: How split_value is interpreted: percent or fixed_amount

split_value.description: Split value for the selected mode (0-100 for percent, dollar amount for fixed_amount)

eligible_category_ids.description: Reporting category IDs that participate in split
